privileged_info_summary: The task files (setup scripts, verifier, and data files) are entirely missing from the repository. Web searches confirmed that CRA Form T90 and Section 87 of the Indian Act are valid Canadian tax laws for First Nations tax exemptions. However, due to the missing data, all claims regarding the specific taxpayer, dependent, province, complexity, and expected file paths remain unverified.
